title: Jupunba nervosa
taxonomy: Jupunba nervosa is a species within the family Ebenaceae, which is a small family of flowering plants native to the tropical forests of New Caledonia. This family is part of the larger order Santalales, which includes a diverse range of plant species. Ebenaceae is one of the 13 families within the order Santalales. Jupunba nervosa is a dioecious species, meaning it has separate male and female plants. Its classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history as a distinct member of the plant kingdom.
